samples.text: All fish are animals. A bicycle is not a fish. Therefore, is a bicycle an animal?
Every fish belongs to the category of animals. A bicycle is not a fish. Does it follow that a bicycle is an animal?
All aquatic animals are animals. A mountain bike is not an aquatic animal. Therefore, is a mountain bike an animal?
A bicycle is not in the group of fish. Only fish are stated to be animals here. Based on this, is a bicycle an animal?
All fish are animals. A bicycle is not a fish. The weather today is cloudy. Therefore, is a bicycle an animal?
